title: Microbial degradation of polyhydroxy ether of bisphenol-A using pseudomonous species
author: Samaresh Ghosh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Materials Science Centre, Department of Chemistry, Department of Agriculture and Food Engineering, 

 Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur-721 302, India 

  E-mail :  abanthia@hotmail.com Fax: 91-3222-755303 

  Manuscript received 21 January 2002, revised 22 July 2002. accepted 24 September 2002  

 Degradation of polyhydroxy ether of bisphenol-A (PHEBA) by cultured microorganisms has been studied by isolating soil microbe, identified as psuedomonous species. The extent of degradation of the polymer films was determined by monitoring the percent weight-loss, change in intrinsic viscosity, as well as chemical change using IR spectroscopy at different intervals of time.
